[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] '''Orvak''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officer who, from his [[TIE stealth]], led a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighter]] attack during the [[Third Battle of Yavin|battle of the Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].

Accompanied by his subordinate [[Dareb]], Commander Orvak flew under the [[Jedi Praxeum]]'s [[Deflector shield/Legends|shield]] and blew up the [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generators]] using [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]]. He then sneaked into the [[Great Temple/Legends|Great Temple]] where he planted further detonators. He was bitten by a [[crystal snake]] and only regained consciousness as his bombs were about to explode. Orvak was killed in the blast.

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Jedi Under Siege]]'' {{1st}}
